task.title: Redesign auto step owner as real supervisor process for PR #511

events.content: Run specialist and owner concurrently with worker PTY mirrored into the workflow channel: Run specialist and owner concurrently with worker PTY mirrored into the workflow channel

raw.question: Run specialist and owner concurrently with worker PTY mirrored into the workflow channel
raw.chosen: Run specialist and owner concurrently with worker PTY mirrored into the workflow channel
raw.reasoning: This keeps the specialist as the real producer of step output while giving the owner a separate process that can supervise via channel activity, file checks, and explicit follow-up messages.

retrospective.summary: Turned auto step owners into real supervisor processes that run alongside specialists, preserve specialist output chaining, and added coverage for channel/file verification plus self-owned fallback.
